---
title: "System Status"
---

<img src="images/main_logo.png" class="centered-image">

## Current Status

::: {.callout-note}
## Real-Time Node Telemetry
<div id="api-status">🔄 Connecting to GB7CAM API...</div>
:::

---

## Active Network Links

<div id="links-container">
  <p>Loading active AXUDP links...</p>
</div>

---

## Recently Heard Stations (MHeard)

<div id="mheard-container">
  <p>Loading recently heard stations on Port 3...</p>
</div>

---

## Network Routing Nodes

<div style="margin-bottom: 15px;">
  <input type="text" id="node-search" placeholder="🔍 Search nodes by callsign or alias..." style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 1em;">
</div>

<div id="nodes-container" style="max-height: 400px; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid #eee; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px; background: #fafafa;">
  <p>Loading routing node index...</p>
</div>

---

## System Details

- Node: GB7CAM  
- Mode: AX.25 / LINBPQ  
- Frequency: 144.950 MHz  

---

## Operational History

- Database entry: 23-May-2026  
- Next review: 23-Jul-2028

```{=html}
<script>
// Global storage to let the search filter interact with the downloaded node list
let allNodes = [];

async function fetchNodeData() {
  const statusEl = document.getElementById("api-status");
  const linksEl = document.getElementById("links-container");
  const mheardEl = document.getElementById("mheard-container");
  const nodesEl = document.getElementById("nodes-container");

  // Base components to bypass automated system formatting limits
  const protocol = "https:";
  const subdomain = "api";
  const domain = "gb7cam.org.uk";

  try {
    // ---------------------------------------------------
    // 1. FETCH & RENDER ACTIVE LINKS
    // ---------------------------------------------------
    const linksUrl = `${protocol}//${subdomain}.${domain}/links`;
    const linksResponse = await fetch(linksUrl);
    if (!linksResponse.ok) throw new Error("Links API error");
    const linksData = await linksResponse.json();

    linksEl.innerHTML = "";
    if (!linksData.links || linksData.links.length === 0) {
      linksEl.innerHTML = "<p>No active links reported by the node.</p>";
    } else {
      let linksHtml = `
        <table class="table table-hover" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 15px; border-collapse: collapse;">
          <thead>
            <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #ccc; text-align: left;">
              <th style="padding: 8px;">Remote Node</th>
              <th style="padding: 8px;">Local Port</th>
              <th style="padding: 8px;">Type</th>
              <th style="padding: 8px;">Status</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
      `;
      linksData.links.forEach(link => {
        linksHtml += `
          <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;">
            <td style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold; color: #2c3e50;">${link.farCall}</td>
            <td style="padding: 8px;">Port ${link.port}</td>
            <td style="padding: 8px; font-size: 0.9em; color: #666;">${link.linkType}</td>
            <td style="padding: 8px;"><span style="background-color: #d4edda; color: #155724; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9em;">${link.state}</span></td>
          </tr>
        `;
      });
      linksHtml += "</tbody></table>";
      linksEl.innerHTML = linksHtml;
    }

    // ---------------------------------------------------
    // 2. FETCH & RENDER MHEARD PACKET LOGS
    // ---------------------------------------------------
    const mheardUrl = `${protocol}//${subdomain}.${domain}/mheard`;
    const mheardResponse = await fetch(mheardUrl);
    if (!mheardResponse.ok) throw new Error("MHeard API error");
    const mheardData = await mheardResponse.json();

    mheardEl.innerHTML = "";
    if (!mheardData.mheard || mheardData.mheard.length === 0) {
      mheardEl.innerHTML = "<p>No stations heard recently on Port 3.</p>";
    } else {
      let mheardHtml = `
        <table class="table table-hover" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 15px; border-collapse: collapse;">
          <thead>
            <tr style="border-bottom: 2px solid #ccc; text-align: left;">
              <th style="padding: 8px;">Callsign</th>
              <th style="padding: 8px;">Local Port</th>
              <th style="padding: 8px;">Packets Exchanged</th>
              <th style="padding: 8px;">Last Active (UTC)</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
      `;
      mheardData.mheard.forEach(station => {
        mheardHtml += `
          <tr style="border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;">
            <td style="padding: 8px; font-weight: bold; color: #2980b9;">${station.callSign}</td>
            <td style="padding: 8px;">Port ${station.port}</td>
            <td style="padding: 8px;">${Number(station.packets).toLocaleString()}</td>
            <td style="padding: 8px; font-size: 0.95em; color: #555;">${station.lastHeard}</td>
          </tr>
        `;
      });
      mheardHtml += "</tbody></table>";
      mheardEl.innerHTML = mheardHtml;
    }

    // ---------------------------------------------------
    // 3. FETCH & RENDER THE GLOBAL ROUTING NODES
    // ---------------------------------------------------
    const nodesUrl = `${protocol}//${subdomain}.${domain}/nodes`;
    const nodesResponse = await fetch(nodesUrl);
    if (!nodesResponse.ok) throw new Error("Nodes API error");
    const nodesData = await nodesResponse.json();

    allNodes = nodesData.nodes || [];
    renderNodes(allNodes);

    // Update global header status on complete pipeline success
    statusEl.innerHTML = "🟢 <strong>OPERATIONAL</strong> (Live telemetry active)";

  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Telemetry fetch failed:", error);
    statusEl.innerHTML = "⚠️ <strong>MAINTENANCE / OFFLINE</strong> (Unable to connect to home server)";
    
    const errorBanner = "<p style='color: #721c24; background-color: #f8d7da; padding: 10px; border-radius: 4px;'>Telemetry server is currently unreachable. The node may be undergoing maintenance.</p>";
    linksEl.innerHTML = errorBanner;
    mheardEl.innerHTML = errorBanner;
    nodesEl.innerHTML = errorBanner;
  }
}

// Separate render module to keep updates snappy during keyword typing
function renderNodes(nodesList) {
  const nodesEl = document.getElementById("nodes-container");
  
  if (nodesList.length === 0) {
    nodesEl.innerHTML = "<p style='color: #666; padding: 10px;'>No matching nodes found index matching that pattern.</p>";
    return;
  }

  let nodesHtml = `
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 10px; padding: 5px;">
  `;

  nodesList.forEach(node => {
    const aliasText = node.Alias ? `<span style="color: #e67e22; font-size: 0.9em;">:${node.Alias}</span>` : '';
    const routeCount = node.Routes ? node.Routes.length : 0;
    
    nodesHtml += `
      <div style="background: white; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);">
        <div style="font-weight: bold; color: #2c3e50; font-size: 1.05em;">${node.Call}${aliasText}</div>
        <div style="font-size: 0.85em; color: #7f8c8d; margin-top: 4px;">🗺️ Routes Available: <strong>${routeCount}</strong></div>
      </div>
    `;
  });

  nodesHtml += "</div>";
  nodesEl.innerHTML = nodesHtml;
}

// Bind search field logic on load
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  fetchNodeData();

  const searchInput = document.getElementById("node-search");
  searchInput.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
    const searchTerm = e.target.value.toUpperCase().trim();
    
    const filtered = allNodes.filter(node => {
      const matchCall = node.Call.toUpperCase().includes(searchTerm);
      const matchAlias = node.Alias && node.Alias.toUpperCase().includes(searchTerm);
      return matchCall || matchAlias;
    });
    
    renderNodes(filtered);
  });
});
</script>
```
